ast.name: appendText
ast.source: Detailed documentation can be found at
ast.target: 详细文档可在以下位置找到

ast.name: log
ast.target: 正在加载 siteswap 插件

ast.name: log
ast.target: 正在卸载 siteswap 插件

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Width of the animation, in pixels.
ast.target: 动画的宽度，以像素为单位。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Height of the animation, in pixels.
ast.target: 动画的高度，以像素为单位。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Scaling factor for the generated GIF. 1.0 performs no scaling.
ast.target: 生成的 GIF 的缩放因子。1.0 表示不进行缩放。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Number of frames per second in the generated GIF.
ast.target: 生成的 GIF 中每秒的帧数。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Defines an overall time slowdown factor (e.g., slowdown: 1.0 is actual speed, slowdown: 2.0 is half actual speed).
ast.target: 定义整体时间减速因子（例如，slowdown: 1.0 是实际速度，slowdown: 2.0 是实际速度的一半）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.target: 是否显示地面。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: List of one or more jugglers to hide (i.e., not render) during animation. Examples: hidejugglers=1 or hidejugglers=(1,3).
ast.target: 在动画期间要隐藏（即不渲染）的一个或多个杂耍者列表。示例：hidejugglers=1 或 hidejugglers=(1,3)。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Whether to display the pattern as a cross-eyed stereogram.
ast.target: 是否将图案显示为交叉眼立体图。

ast.name: setName
ast.target: width

ast.name: setName
ast.target: height

ast.name: setName
ast.target: scale

ast.name: setName
ast.target: fps

ast.name: setName
ast.target: slowdown

ast.name: setName
ast.target: showground

ast.name: setName
ast.target: camangle

ast.name: setName
ast.target: hidejugglers

ast.name: setName
ast.target: stereo

ast.name: text
ast.target: Siteswap 设置

ast.name: text
ast.source:
These settings apply to all generated siteswap 
					animations, but can be overridden by specifying these parameters in the pattern 
					configuration.
ast.target: 这些设置适用于所有生成的 siteswap \n\t\t\t\t\t动画，但可以通过在图案 \n\t\t\t\t\t配置中指定这些参数来覆盖。

ast.name: text
ast.source:
Note that existing animations won't update automatically after updating settings. 
			Turning the plugin off and on again is the easiest way to update everything.
ast.target: 请注意，更新设置后现有动画不会自动更新。 \n\t\t\t关闭并重新打开插件是更新所有内容的最简单方法。
